verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your Spirit is present I feel You near Others are moved I'm waiting right here Look my way, won't You, Jesus I am needy too I've gotten a little cold But I'm reaching out to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need Your touch, don't pass over me Once more, Lord, I'm crying to Thee See Your servant standing right here Determined to meet You Won't You draw near I'm so determined, fill me Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm coming here desperate It's life and death to me Consumed by a hunger Please give me what I need I'll stay here till it happens It's You and I Lord My heart is expecting You To fulfill Your Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I won't let go till my blessings come Then I'll know You're my father And I am Your son
